# themes/gruvbox.py - Gruvbox Theme

Gruvbox dark color scheme with warm retro colors.

---

## Theme: `gruvbox`

A retro groove color scheme with warm, muted colors on dark backgrounds.

### Colors

| Slot | Color |
|------|-------|
| `bg` | Dark gray (#282828) |
| `fg` | Cream (#ebdbb2) |
| `label.fg` | Cream |
| `button.bg` | Blue (#458588) |
| `button.fg` | Dark gray |
| `button.focused.bg` | Yellow (#d79921) |
| `input.bg` | Medium gray (#504945) |
| `input.fg` | Cream |
| `input.cursor` | Bright cream |
| `window.bg` | Medium dark (#3c3836) |
| `window.border` | Gray |
| `window.active.border` | Orange (#d65d0e) |
| `dialog.border` | Aqua (#689d6a) |
| `menu.selected.bg` | Orange |
| `taskbar.bg` | Medium gray |

### Glyphs

| Glyph | Character |
|-------|-----------|
| `checkbox.checked` | `[x]` |
| `checkbox.unchecked` | `[ ]` |
| `radio.selected` | `(*)` |
| `scrollbar.thumb` | `▓` |
| `scrollbar.track` | `░` |
| `window.close` | `[x]` |
| `menu.arrow` | `►` |
| `cursor.arrow` | `▲` |
| `cursor.text` | `│` |

### Usage

```python
app = App(theme="gruvbox")
```
